title: Brinqa Intelligence Briefing
description: Daily Brinqa intelligence briefing with news, product updates, competitive landscape, and a private-company financial snapshot.

news.title: Partners with Horizon3.ai to advance CTEM
news.desc: Strategic technology partnership to operationalize Continuous Threat Exposure Management, strengthen risk-based vulnerability management, and advance Adversarial Exposure Validation.

news.title: Platform 12.1 release ships
news.desc: Latest 12.x release (12.1.222) continues a steady cadence of platform and integration enhancements across the exposure lifecycle.

news.title: Introduces AI agents for continuous exposure management
news.desc: Launches the AI Attribution Agent and AI Deduplication Agent to resolve unclear asset ownership and duplicate exposure signals while keeping humans in control.

news.title: Next-generation platform architecture unveiled
news.desc: A cloud-scaling, high-resiliency architecture built to process from millions to billions of findings for AI-driven workloads.

news.title: Named to Built In's 2026 Best Places to Work
news.desc: Recognized for the second consecutive year amid a year of record growth and expanded leadership.

products.title: AI Attribution & Deduplication Agents
products.desc: Embedded AI agents that continuously fix unclear asset ownership and de-duplicate exposure signals across Brinqa's trusted data foundation, with explainable, measurable recommendations.

products.title: Next-Generation Platform Architecture
products.desc: Dynamic cloud-scaling, high-resiliency core that scales from millions to billions of findings while maintaining performance and continuous processing.

products.title: Bring Your Own AI Agent (BYOAI)
products.desc: The first exposure management platform to support a bring-your-own-agent model, letting enterprises plug their own agents into the platform.

products.title: BrinqaIQ
products.desc: AI-powered decisioning layer that turns unified exposure data into smarter, prioritized remediation guidance.

products.title: Unified Exposure Management Platform
products.desc: Tool-agnostic data fabric that ingests and normalizes vulnerability and exposure data from any scanner to power RBVM and CTEM programs.

competitors.name: Tenable (Tenable One)
competitors.strength: Market-leading exposure platform anchored by Nessus, with broad native scanning across cloud, OT, AD, and CIEM, plus public-company scale
competitors.advantage: Tool-agnostic: aggregates and normalizes data from any scanner rather than locking customers into one vendor's telemetry

competitors.name: Qualys (TruRisk / VMDR)
competitors.strength: Leading cloud-based VMDR with massive scale and integrated scanning plus remediation
competitors.advantage: Unifies third-party scanner data and customizable risk modeling without requiring Qualys sensors

competitors.name: Vulcan Cyber
competitors.strength: Strong vulnerability remediation orchestration and risk-based prioritization
competitors.advantage: Broader risk data fabric, embedded AI agents, and enterprise scale across billions of findings

competitors.name: Cisco Vuln Mgmt (Kenna)
competitors.strength: Pioneer of risk-based prioritization, backed by Cisco's scale and threat intelligence
competitors.advantage: Dedicated, customizable exposure data model and tool-agnostic integrations vs. a bundled module

footer: Competitive-intelligence briefing generated from public web sources on June 22, 2026. Brinqa is privately held; financial figures are third-party estimates and vary by source.
